ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of the model */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken for this training iteration */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Indicator if the training iteration is complete */,
  "training_iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the training process */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training iteration */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the training iteration */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for training */,
  "pid" INTEGER /* Process ID of the training process */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname where the training process occurred */,
  "node_ip" TEXT /* Node IP address where the training process occurred */,
  "time_since_restore" INTEGER /* Time since the last restore */,
  "iterations_since_restore" INTEGER /* Number of iterations since the last restore */,
  "experiment_tag" TEXT /* Tag for the experiment being run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the training */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Additional hyperparameters used during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "n_changepoints" INTEGER /* Number of changepoints in the model */,
  "changepoint_range" REAL /* Range of changepoints */,
  "changepoint_prior_scale" REAL /* Prior scale for changepoints */,
  "seasonality_prior_scale" REAL /* Prior scale for seasonality */,
  "seasonality_mode" TEXT /* Mode of seasonality (e.g., additive, multiplicative) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Additional hyperparameters used during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training iteration */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training iteration */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the training iteration */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken for the training iteration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the training */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Additional hyperparameters used during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_iterations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_iterations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_iterations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES training_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status (e.g., training, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "prediction_data" TEXT /* File path to the prediction data */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
